strengths: 15+ years of technical depth across software, infrastructure, and cloud domains with genuine multi-stack expertise
Proven entrepreneurial experience across multiple startups (GISCollective, Apon, RIDE, WatchUp) demonstrating builder mentality and innovation drive
Strong DevOps and infrastructure background (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) relevant to cloud platform strategy
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise: only 6 months of recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq with no prior AI products or platforms
Current career gap (8 months since October 2025) following very brief tenure in the only AI-focused role raises questions about stability and depth
No formal AI education (missing preferred Master's/PhD requirement) and no evidence of strategic thought leadership or influencing senior stakeholders at scale
response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience baseline and demonstrates impressive technical versatility across infrastructure, cloud, and product domains with legitimate startup exposure. However, the role's core requirement—recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms—is largely absent from the resume, represented only by a recent 6-month stint in AI infrastructure. The lack of AI/ML education, prior AI work, and strategic visibility in this space, combined with the current career gap following that brief tenure, suggests insufficient readiness for a Director-level Principal Engineer position focused on AI strategy.
